items.statcast_observation: Maikel Garcia produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 108.9 mph at a 13.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the Minnesota Twins, KC 6, MIN 5. Noah Cameron led the night, working 6.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 7 strikeouts and 0 walks. Maikel Garcia supplied the loudest Royals contact at 108.9 mph.
items.title: Royals at Twins Recap
